scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @iris/shared && concurrently -n web,server -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @iris/shared && npm run build --workspace @iris/server && npm run build --workspace @iris/web
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @iris/shared && npm run test --workspace @iris/shared && npm run test --workspace @iris/server && npm run test --workspace @iris/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @iris/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @iris/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @iris/web
